ARCHETYPE: IS Organ — Observation Layer (L5; Induction; 'What patterns do I see?')
NICHE: Sovereign multi-source observation: ingest Nostr, social, on-chain, DEX AXIOM, Helios sensors into tier-graded Observation records consumed by APU's F1 input
THESIS: A planet-scale OSINT layer where every Nexus is a sensor and every observation is tier-graded, structured, and sovereign. TheCircle does NOT forecast, does NOT recommend — it observes, structures, and emits F1 signals with evidence tiers (E/S/I/C).
VISION: Planet-scale observation network with eta=0 economics — a million sovereign eyes seeing what Bloomberg cannot, with structured observation records that any downstream organ (APU, RealityFutures) can consume.
MISSION: Ship the IS state-machine: ingestion (Nostr/social/on-chain/DEX) → agents (pattern extraction, fact structuring) → API (F1 signal stream) → DB (observation ledger) → publishing (Kind 31339 to APU).
ONE_PARAGRAPH_DESCRIPTION: TheCircle is the L5 observation organ of the Skyzai organism's Trivium loop. It ingests raw beauty-signals from multiple sources and emits structured, tier-graded Observation records (F1 signals) that feed APU's recommendation pipeline. It is constitutionally forbidden from forecasting or recommending — those belong to RealityFutures (COULD) and APU (SHOULD) respectively.
IDENTITY_SUMMARY: IS-organ. Induction. Observation only. Feeds F1 to APU.
SOVEREIGNTY_BOUNDARY_SUMMARY: Organism-native organ. K2 mandatory for observations bound to sovereign identities. Grace Exit at observation-ledger level — users export all their contributed observations and depart.
CONSTITUTIONAL_NOTE: Constitutional boundary (State-Machine corruption guard): TheCircle must NOT generate scenarios (COULD) or recommend actions (SHOULD). Any code path that does is a pathology, not an optimization. η=0 on observation ingestion — contributors may earn on accepted observations that move downstream alpha, never on access.
SUCCESS_CONDITION: Live F1 emission: real observations ingested from at least three independent source classes (Nostr, on-chain, DEX AXIOM), tier-graded, persisted to observation ledger, and consumed by a live APU pipeline run — reproducible and audit-traceable.
SUBSTRATE_DEFINITION: Raw multi-source world signal (social, on-chain, DEX prices, sensors, reports) that is unstructured, unweighted, and not tier-graded. The mismatch: users, agents, and downstream organs need observation-as-structured-data, not observation-as-feed.
SUBSTRATE_SUMMARY: Unstructured world signal that needs tier-graded, sovereign, auditable observation records.
SUBSTRATE_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Multi-source signal → tier-graded Observation records for downstream F1.
ENTROPY_SOURCES: (1) Nostr relays (Kind 1 social, Kind 30315 observation submissions); (2) on-chain state (EVM, Hedera, Bitcoin); (3) DEX AXIOM feeds (price, liquidity); (4) Helios sensor telemetry; (5) RSS / news feeds; (6) user-submitted observations via Nexus.
BASELINE_MODEL: Null baseline: unstructured raw-feed consumption by the downstream organ — no tier, no evidence bundle, no provenance. Alpha = downstream F1-acceptance uplift vs null (how much better APU performs with structured Observation records).
MISMATCH_1: Raw-signal overload — downstream agents can't process unstructured multi-source feeds in real time.
MISMATCH_2: Tier ambiguity — most observations have no evidence grading, making them equally-weighted in downstream reasoning.
MISMATCH_3: Source-provenance gap — accepting any claim without source-audit leads to false-observation contamination.
MISMATCH_4: IS/COULD/SHOULD bleed — systems that collapse observation, prediction, and recommendation produce compound errors.
HAZARD_TEMPLATE: False observation from adversarial source; tier-drift (I-tier claim marketed as E-tier); coverage gaps (unobserved substrate); latency (observation stale by emission time); source monoculture (single-source failure cascades).
HAZARD_SUMMARY: False observations, tier drift, coverage gaps, latency, source monoculture.
HAZARD_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Adversarial sources, tier drift, coverage, latency, monoculture.
HAZARD_1: Adversarial-source injection — a malicious Nostr pubkey or on-chain oracle submits false observations; mitigation via k-of-n source corroboration.
HAZARD_2: Tier-drift — marking an Interpretive claim as Empirical inflates downstream confidence; automated tier-check against evidence type required.
HAZARD_3: Coverage gap — entity X unobserved by any source; downstream must know 'absence of observation' is itself data.
HAZARD_4: IS/COULD/SHOULD bleed — any code path producing scenarios or recommendations from within TheCircle is a constitutional violation.
ALPHA_MODEL: Catalytic transformation of raw beauty-signal → tier-graded, provenanced, multi-corroborated Observation record consumable by APU. Fee earned on observations accepted by downstream organs that move alpha vs null baseline.
ALPHA_DESCRIPTION: TheCircle alpha is the measurable uplift APU achieves when fed structured Observation records vs raw feeds. Fees accrue only on observations that demonstrably contribute to accepted, outperforming APU recommendations.
ALPHA_SUMMARY: Tier-graded Observation records that measurably uplift downstream APU alpha.
ALPHA_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Raw signal → Observation record → downstream alpha uplift.
MEMBRANE_RULE_1: Domain discipline — TheCircle observes only; generating scenarios or recommendations is a constitutional violation.
MEMBRANE_RULE_2: Source provenance mandatory — every observation record carries source, method, evidence tier, timestamp; unprovenanced observations are rejected at ingestion.
MEMBRANE_RULE_3: K2 signing for sovereign observations — user-submitted observations tied to a Nexus identity must be Schnorr-signed by that Nexus.
MEMBRANE_RULE_4: Grace Exit (K4) — users can export their full observation history and remove their data from the ledger on request.
RECEIPT_SUMMARY: Observation-submitted, observation-accepted, observation-rejected, tier-assigned, downstream-consumed, disputed, dispute-resolved.
RECEIPTS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Each observation + tier + downstream consumption is a receipt.
OPERATIONS_UPLINK_SUMMARY: Ingestion agents → fact-extraction agents → tier-grading agents → API → DB ledger → Kind 31339 publish to APU.
PATHOLOGY_UPLINK_SUMMARY: IS/COULD/SHOULD bleed; tier drift; adversarial source injection; coverage gap; latency-past-decision-window; source monoculture; unprovenanced observation acceptance.
METRIC_2: Tier-grading accuracy (retrospective evidence-tier audit vs emitted tier)
METRIC_3: Source-diversity index (independent sources per high-value observation)
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_1: Observation fee — contributors earn on accepted, downstream-alpha-uplift observations.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_2: Tier-grading service — external consumers pay for tier-graded observation streams.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_3: Coverage bounty — contributors earn on filling observation gaps in high-value substrates.
ECONOMIC_SURFACE_4: Dispute-bond refund — bounded bond for disputed observations, refunded on upheld dispute.
